workflow.trigger: sheep-ovary context plus a readable full-feature Seurat RDS
workflow.banksy_role: optional spatial clustering adapter or corroborating view
workflow.scanpy_role: fallback for AnnData-first inputs or an independent corroborating analysis
workflow.resolution_rule: adaptive; select the lowest-complexity broad resolution supported by current-query full-feature markers, anti-markers, stability and spatial morphology

trigger_all: R object inspection reports a Seurat object
Spatial assay is present with at least 10000 features
input provenance or path identifies a StereoPy cellbin_PPed conversion
stereopy_cellbin_pped_contract.exception_policy: a numerical deviation requires an explicit batch-exception flag and a substantive recorded rationale; biological resolution selection remains adaptive

release_policy.maximum_default_depth: broad plus one independently supported functional subtype
release_policy.oocyte_rule: require multiple non-ZP oocyte modules, somatic anti-program clearance, spatial object morphology and strict candidate reclustering
release_policy.rare_neural_rule: SOX10/S100B/PLP1/MPZ-like glial backbone or a coherent neuronal program plus track-like morphology; DLG2 or another single neuronal gene is insufficient
